title: Create verse-parser crate with database.rs SymbolDb implementation
acceptance_criteria: SymbolDb loads all 3 bundled digests (Verse, Fortnite, UnrealEngine); find_class, find_extension_methods, search, get_module, get_public_symbols methods work correctly; Digests embedded via include_str! macro

title: Create verse-lsp workspace symbols handler
acceptance_criteria: workspace_symbol handler searches all modules for matching symbols; Results limited to 50 items; SymbolInformation includes name, kind, location with digest:// URI, container_name; Query matching is case-insensitive substring

title: Create verse-analysis crate with completion logic and heuristic type resolution
acceptance_criteria: verse-analysis crate provides completion logic; guess_type function implements heuristic type resolution (Player→player, Agent→agent, Entity→entity, Transform→transform); complete_member returns class members or fallback to public symbols; complete_module_path handles /Verse.org/ and /Fortnite.com/ paths

title: Create verse-lsp README.md with installation and usage instructions
acceptance_criteria: README.md includes: 1) Project description (Verse language LSP, standalone), 2) Installation steps (cargo install or VSIX), 3) Editor configuration (VSCode settings.json, Neovim init.lua), 4) Features list (completion, hover, goto-def), 5) Limitations (heuristic type inference, digest-only)

title: Create VSCode extension wrapper: package.json, extension.ts
acceptance_criteria: package.json declares verse-community-lsp with vscode-languageclient dependency; extension.ts launches verse-lsp binary and connects via stdio; Activates on *.verse and *.digest.verse file patterns; VSIX package includes bin/ directory for all platforms

title: Create verse-parser crate structure with lexer.rs token definitions
acceptance_criteria: lexer.rs defines TokenKind enum with all keyword, punctuation, and special tokens; Token struct has kind, text, line, col fields; VISIBILITY_TAGS, EFFECT_TAGS, SPECIFIER_TAGS constants match plan

title: Create verse-lsp main.rs with tower-lsp LanguageServer trait implementation
acceptance_criteria: main.rs implements tower-lsp LanguageServer trait; ServerCapabilities includes completion, hover, definition, document_symbol, workspace_symbol; VerseServer struct holds Arc<SymbolDb> and Arc<RwLock<DocumentMap>>; stdin/stdout transport with tokio async runtime

title: Create verse-lsp document sync: did_open, did_change handlers
acceptance_criteria: did_open handler stores Document with version and content in DocumentMap; did_change handler applies incremental changes using range/range_length; Full content replacement when range not provided; Document version tracked and updated

title: Create verse-lsp workspace Cargo.toml
acceptance_criteria: Cargo.toml creates workspace with 3 crates: verse-parser, verse-analysis, verse-lsp; Dependencies include tower-lsp-server=0.23, tokio, serde, regex, thiserror; Path sections correctly reference local crates

title: Create verse-lsp goto-definition handler with digest:// URI scheme
acceptance_criteria: goto_definition handler returns GotoDefinitionResponse::Location; digest:// URI scheme encodes source (Verse/Fortnite/UnrealEngine) and line number; Range points to symbol definition position; Custom URI scheme registered for editor navigation

title: Create verse-lsp multi-platform build script: Linux, Windows, Mac
acceptance_criteria: build.sh compiles for x86_64-unknown-linux-gnu, x86_64-pc-windows-gnu, aarch64-apple-darwin; Binary output copied to extension/bin/{Linux,Win64,Darwin}/; Cross-compilation uses rustup target add; release profile with opt-level=3

title: Create verse-lsp completion handler: global, member, module path completion
acceptance_criteria: completion handler responds to trigger characters '.' and '/'; Returns CompletionResponse with CompletionItemKind::METHOD for methods; insert_text_format is SNIPPET with parameter placeholders; documentation includes signature and effect tags

title: Create verse-parser crate with parser.rs state machine implementation
acceptance_criteria: parser.rs implements state machine: TOPLEVEL → IN_MODULE → IN_CLASS/IN_ENUM/IN_INTERFACE; Parses Module, Class, Enum, Interface declarations; Handles extension methods (Receiver:Type).MethodName pattern; Tag parsing correctly extracts visibility and effects

title: Create verse-parser crate structure with symbol.rs data structures
acceptance_criteria: symbol.rs defines Symbol, SymbolKind, Visibility, Tag enums; SymbolDetail enum covers Class, Method, Field, Module, Enum, Interface; Param and Location structs match plan specification; All types derive Debug, Clone, PartialEq, Eq, Hash where appropriate

title: Create verse-parser tests: parse all 3 digest files, verify class counts
acceptance_criteria: Tests parse Verse.digest.verse.txt (expect ~89 classes); Tests parse Fortnite.digest.verse.txt (expect ~500 classes); Tests parse UnrealEngine.digest.verse.txt (expect ~39 classes); find_extension_methods finds methods like FindDescendantEntities on entity type; search function returns relevant results for 'transform' query

title: Create verse-lsp hover handler with markdown formatting
acceptance_criteria: hover handler returns Hover with MarkupContent(kind=Markdown); Markdown includes symbol name, doc comment, signature block for methods; format matches plan example: effects in <>, params as name:type, return type after :; Field hover shows type expression
